category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-Gabon EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入加蓬：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入加彭：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Gabon AGANOR conformity expectations, ARSEE and SEEG grid coordination, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector alignment, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, French-language documentation, humid equatorial installation conditions, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与加蓬AGANOR合格评定预期、ARSEE和SEEG并网协调、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、IEC 61000 EMC证据、法语文件、赤道高湿安装环境，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與加彭AGANOR合格評定預期、ARSEE和SEEG併網協調、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、IEC 61000 EMC證據、法語文件、赤道高濕安裝環境，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Gabon, the practical gaps are AGANOR conformity review, ARSEE and SEEG coordination for any grid-connected installation, IEC-family safety and EMC evidence, connector redesign from China GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC, French documentation, and thermal/corrosion derating for Gabon's hot, humid equatorial environment. Gabon's grid is commonly referenced as 220/380 V, 50 Hz, close to China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline, but site voltage quality, protection coordination, earthing, load capacity, and commissioning still need SEEG confirmation. A published Gabon EVSE-specific mandatory certification scheme could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14. The EV market and public charging infrastructure appear extremely nascent, so exporters should treat opportunities as project-specific pilots rather than a mature commercial rollout.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入加蓬时，实务差距包括：AGANOR合格评定审查；任何并网安装均需与ARSEE和SEEG协调；IEC体系安全及EMC证据；将中国GB/T 20234接口改为交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2；法语文件；以及针对加蓬炎热、高湿赤道环境的热降额和防腐设计。加蓬电网通常按220/380 V、50 Hz理解，接近中国220/380 V、50 Hz基线，但站点电压质量、保护配合、接地、负荷容量和调试仍须由SEEG确认。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认加蓬已发布EVSE专项强制认证制度。加蓬电动汽车市场和公共充电基础设施仍极为初级，出口商应将机会视为项目制试点，而非成熟商业推广。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入加彭時，實務差距包括：AGANOR合格評定審查；任何併網安裝均需與ARSEE和SEEG協調；IEC體系安全及EMC證據；將中國GB/T 20234接口改為交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2；法語文件；以及針對加彭炎熱、高濕赤道環境的熱降額和防腐設計。加彭電網通常按220/380 V、50 Hz理解，接近中國220/380 V、50 Hz基線，但站點電壓質量、保護配合、接地、負荷容量和調試仍須由SEEG確認。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認加彭已發布EVSE專項強制認證制度。加彭電動汽車市場和公共充電基礎設施仍極為初級，出口商應將機會視為項目制試點，而非成熟商業推廣。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, AGANOR scope determination, ARSEE approval, SEEG grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, fleet owners, and installers should verify current Gabon conformity assessment rules, IEC standard editions, French labelling requirements, customs classification, and SEEG site requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、AGANOR适用范围裁定、ARSEE批准、SEEG并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商、车队业主和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行加蓬合格评定规则、IEC标准版本、法语标签要求、海关归类和SEEG站点要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、AGANOR適用範圍裁定、ARSEE批准、SEEG併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商、車隊業主和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行加彭合格評定規則、IEC標準版本、法語標籤要求、海關歸類和SEEG站點要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
